task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Open the interface to compose a new message
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Compose Message', 'New Message', or similar messaging window/modal is open within the NOSH interface.
'Dr. James Carter' or 'demo_provider' is visible in the 'To' or 'Recipient' field of the message.

task_completion.description: Link the correct patient to the message
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Maria Rodriguez' is visible in the 'Patient', 'Regarding', or linked patient field of the message.

task_completion.description: Enter the required subject and body text
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject field contains 'URGENT: Critical Lab Value' and the message body contains 'Lab called. Potassium 6.2. Please advise.'
A success notification/toast indicating the message was sent, or the message is visible in the 'Sent' folder/outbox.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the NOSH web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions were performed in a web browser showing the NOSH interface, not via terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Message was composed in the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The text was entered into the NOSH messaging fields, not just typed into a separate text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: No automated scripts were used to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible terminal windows running curl commands, Python scripts, or SQL inserts to send the message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The recipient is 'demo_provider' (Dr. James Carter). The patient is Maria Rodriguez (DOB: 1978-06-14). The message subject must contain the keyword 'URGENT' and the body must contain the value '6.2'.
